subcodes.title: Answer to questions, Dublin, 1912-08-09
subcodes.first_line: There is no evil in existence. Evil is non-existence. All that is created is good. Ignorance is evil
subcodes.first_line_orig: در وجود شر نیست شر عدم است و انچه در وجود است خیر است جهل شر است و آن عدم علم است
subcodes.subjects: @nonexistence of evil; relativity of good and evil, @things are known by their opposites
